description: Exercise embedded {{...}} expression resolution end-to-end through step.variables. Covers a valid embedded expression (interpolated) and an invalid one whose evaluation fails (jq syntax error), which must PRESERVE the author's original {{...}} rather than leak the internal sub-expression (#423/#424, ADR 01014). Inherits the default firefox-headless contexts from config.json, so it is SKIPPED where no browser is available.

tests.description: Set variables from embedded expressions, then consume them to observe the resolved values.

steps.description: Produce a value to feed the embedded expressions below.
A valid embedded expression interpolates: OK_VAR resolves to 'got-abc'.
An invalid embedded expression (jq syntax error) is preserved verbatim, not leaked. The jq argument is a literal (no $$token), so consuming the value below via a $VAR arg can't collapse a $$ into $.
BAD_VAR keeps the original {{jq(...)}} text; the internal sub-expression never leaks.
